---
title:  "Species Sensitivity Distributions (SSD) for Ecotoxicological Risk Assessment"
author: "Hannes Reinwald"
date:   "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    code_folding: show
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
runtime: shiny
---

## Introduction
Species Sensitivity Distributions (SSD) are a widely used tool in ecotoxicology for assessing the risk of chemicals to various species. This document provides a practical workflow for generating SSDs using R, including data preparation, model fitting, and visualization.

```{r}

```
